# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function test: int (x: int)
  entry:
      PARAM 0, x_1
      t10 = ADD x_1, x_1
      t11 = ADD t10, x_1
      t12 = ADD t11, x_1
      t15 = ADD t12, x_1
      t17 = ADD t15, x_1
      RETURN t17

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t18 = CALL test, 10
      RETURN t18
